MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT HERVE VATINEL'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date at the same time. That department handles all real property-related cases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
